text:
(a) The portion of Farm-to-Market Road 907 between U.S. Highway 281 and Owassa Road in Hidalgo County is designated as Rudy Villarreal Road.

(b) Subject to Section 225.021 (General Provisions) (c), the department shall:

(1) design and construct markers indicating the highway number, the designation as Rudy Villarreal Road, and any other appropriate information; and

(2) erect a marker at each end of the road and at appropriate intermediate sites along the road.

(c) The requirement that a recognized individual be deceased under Section 225.001 (Restrictions on Naming Highway) does not apply to this section.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.082 (Corporal David Slaton Memorial Highway) by Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 161 (S.B. 1093 ), Sec. 22.001(47), eff. September 1, 2013.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 225. State Highway Names
##### § 225.087 — Rudy Villarreal Road

(a) The portion of Farm-to-Market Road 907 between U.S. Highway 281 and Owassa Road in Hidalgo County is designated as Rudy Villarreal Road.

(b) Subject to Section 225.021 (General Provisions) (c), the department shall:

    (1) design and construct markers indicating the highway number, the designation as Rudy Villarreal Road, and any other appropriate information; and

    (2) erect a marker at each end of the road and at appropriate intermediate sites along the road.

(c) The requirement that a recognized individual be deceased under Section 225.001 (Restrictions on Naming Highway) does not apply to this section.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.082 (Corporal David Slaton Memorial Highway) by Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 161 (S.B. 1093 ), Sec. 22.001(47), eff. September 1, 2013.

*Added by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1314 (H.B.3841), Sec. 1, eff. June 17, 2011.*
